comment.body:
Per GS: Tech Sector & AI Flow Trends
Info Tech saw the largest net buying since Dec '21.
Net buy ratio: 1.5 to 1 (short covers + long buys).
All subsectors net bought:
Leaders: Software, Semis & Semi Equip.
Lesser extent: IT Services.
US TMT AI basket net bought for 8 consecutive sessions.
Hedge funds turning more constructive on AI.
Increased buying post-DeekSeek selloff (Jan 27).

comment.body: Hi Alma, can you advice, why did you choose 5dp? If ATM goes up, 5dpcan turn to 0dp. At5dp, there are multiple spx strikes. When we hedge, we can choose 25-20dp, never choose 5dp. It just seems very low, just want to understand your notion choosing 5dp.

comment.body: pretty simple  They sell put credit spreads 20 wide a few DTE (usually 2-5) and buy to close 1 day later all the way up to thaty day (depending on IF they are red or green) and sell again  Thye only have 1 trade open at a time

comment.body: I am also learning. My 2 cents - I believe main point is to compare far out of money puts to near the ATM puts. If 5dp are increasing compared to 20dp then market thinks a big move is more likely to happen. Other the other hand if far out of money puts are getting sold more then market thinks big move will most likely not happen.
